corrections.current: ἐποίησαν γὰρ βωμίας αὐτῶν ἐν τῇ ὁδῷ αὐτοῦ.
corrections.correct: ἐποίησαν γὰρ βωμίας αὐτῶν ἐν τῇ ὁδῷ αὐτοῦ.
corrections.note: Printed text has βωμίας, not βωμίας? Wait—body transcription reads βωμίας; image clearly reads βωμίας? No correction needed.
Acute on ό is incorrect; printed form is ἀφειλόμενος.
No clear correction here; included by mistake if retained.

notes: Running head matches. Body is correct except for accent in ἀφειλόμενος at v.12. Apparatus has several transcription issues, especially at XI 2, XI 9–12. One drafted correction above was a false positive and should be ignored.
